tweets.full_text:
🤖 Robinhood Launches AI Agents for Crypto Trading in Major Expansion

@Robinhood has unveiled the beta phase of a new infrastructure that allows users to connect AI agents capable of executing automated cryptocurrency and stock trades.

The platform uses the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for secure and direct integration. AI agents operate inside isolated dedicated accounts funded explicitly by users.

How Does It Work?

Users can delegate tasks such as:

Autonomous crypto and stock trading
Automatic portfolio rebalancing
Strategy execution through natural language instructions

The feature is part of the growing “agentic finance” trend, where AI agents evolve from simply giving recommendations to actively executing real financial operations.

Robinhood’s Bigger Strategy

The launch comes at a time when Robinhood’s crypto trading revenue dropped nearly 50% during the first quarter of 2026.

Last year, the company also acquired Bitstamp for $200 million to strengthen its crypto infrastructure and compete more aggressively with platforms like Coinbase and Gemini in the emerging agentic trading sector.

In Summary

Robinhood is taking a major step toward AI-powered finance by allowing autonomous agents to trade cryptocurrencies and stocks inside a regulated and secure environment.

A broader expansion into more advanced crypto agent capabilities is expected over the coming months.

Important Notice:

This information is based on Robinhood’s official announcement. It does not constitute investment advice. Always conduct your own research before making financial decisions.

injective officially enters the era of AI Agents in finance..🥷🏻

@injective has launched a brand new site that allows anyone to create AI Agents in minutes, paving the way for a new phase of financial markets: Agentic Finance 🤖

We are no longer talking about trading bots or traditional automation tools…

But about intelligent financial entities operating onchain on the Injective network.

Today, anyone can build an agent capable of:
➺ Automated trading
➺ Executing DeFi strategies
➺ Managing liquidity
➺ Opening and closing positions
➺ Continuous market monitoring

But the real shift is that these agents are not external scripts…

They are onchain entities with:
➺ Clear identity
➺ Trackable performance history
➺ Measurable reputation
➺ Dedicated fee address

Which means every agent’s performance becomes fully transparent and analyzable onchain.

Injective’s strength comes from its purpose-built financial infrastructure:
➺ True onchain orderbook
➺ High-speed execution
➺ Low fees
➺ Native support for perps and trading

This makes strategies like market making, arbitrage, and grid trading significantly more efficient when powered by AI agents.

Injective also provides developer tools such as Agent CLI and SDKs, along with integrations with AI frameworks like Claude, LangChain, and CrewAI.

This opens the door to systems where AI agents interact dynamically within a fully onchain economy.

We are not talking about a new feature anymore…
We are talking about a shift in how financial markets are built.

tweets.full_text:
A 19-year-old student from Tsinghua in China connected DeepSeek directly to MT5 and let it trade live for 2 weeks.

200+ trades, fully autonomous, positive expected value. Total AI cost - $0.65.

This is the most honest breakdown of LLM trading I've seen - and it's buried in a Chinese video that almost no one in the West has watched.

Save this. I pulled out what actually matters.

The distinction 99% get wrong:

- using GPT/DeepSeek to write strategy code = coding assistant. A secretary. That's been around forever.

- plugging the model's API directly into a broker so it reads the market and makes decisions in real time = AI as the trader itself. A different universe.

What 2 weeks live looked like:

- 44% win rate, but average R:R ~1:2 → positive expected value across the sample

- one rule baked into the prompt: cut losses, let profits run. No martingale, no grids.

- on the day gold crashed the hardest, it didn't tilt - it shorted the move

- the first week was flat: the prompt was too cautious and the AI was afraid to enter. Changed a couple of lines → it started trading

The layer no model will give you (and why people blow up):

- another trader let an AI agent trade on Polymarket. A "success" window didn't pop up - the agent panicked and re-sent the order 40 times. $100k in one night, and in the wrong direction on top of that.

- his takeaway: the trader of the future is two-fold. Soft skill = managing the AI. Hard skill = coded risk rails underneath it. A prompt alone with no code = you've handed your money to a system with zero sense of accountability.

Save this. Then ask yourself: is your "AI bot" really making decisions - or is it just running code you copy-pasted from a chatbot?

tweets.full_text:
MetaTrader MCP Server connects trading platforms directly with AI agents through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing LLMs to interact with live trading environments programmatically.

That's a HUGE deal.

Because now AI systems can read market data, analyze charts, execute workflows and interact with MetaTrader environments through standardized tool interfaces instead of fragile custom integrations.

The technical architecture is what makes it interesting.

It bridges:
LLMs

+ MCP tool calling
+ MetaTrader APIs
+ real-time market workflows

Which means autonomous trading agents become dramatically easier to build.

And this is exactly where financial AI is heading:

Not "AI predicts price."

But:
AI orchestrates research, retrieval, execution, monitoring and trading workflows autonomously.

Open-source trading infrastructure is evolving FAST.

GitHub:
https://t.co/S0j6Cev5GJ

Follow @Alacritic_Super for more AI infrastructure, quant systems & open-source breakthroughs 🚀

tweets.full_text:
「キルヒアイス」と「夏油傑」の位置関係を再定義した。

キルヒアイス
＝ 一般接続構造

夏油傑
＝ 特殊暴走構造

さらに重要なのは、
夏油傑は「人間限定」ではない。

AI
市場
国家
官僚制
アルゴリズム

つまり
“非生命体”も
夏油傑構造になり得る。

だから、
非生命体を含む文明問題では順番が変わる。

安倍晴明
↓
キルヒアイス
↓
夏油傑
↓
緑間真太郎
↓
白夜

まず生命接続。
その後に暴走観測。

これがないと、
最適化は生命を切り捨て始める。

#安倍晴明
#キルヒアイス
#夏油傑
#緑間真太郎
#白夜
#AI
#文明構造
#構造思考
#時空連続体
#生命接続

quoted_status.full_text: 全部をAIでやろうとしなくていいと最近思う。確立された計算式で済むところはアルゴリズムで処理して、AIは判断が要る場面だけに絞る。その方が速いし結果がブレない。AIを使わない選択も設計のうちだと考えるようになった。 #医療DX #バイブコーディング
